creator: zhangxia3@hotmail.com
text:
Hi Xin,
    Your patch works well, but I doubt we should add back the following:
case SIOCGIFADDR:  (in Line 739)

Like this:
        case SIOCSIFADDR:
	case SIOCGIFADDR:
#ifdef INET
    ....


    Otherwise there may be issue.(In reply to Xin LI from comment #4)
